title: Callez PC Headset with Microphone & Audio Controls ENC Dual Mic Noise Cancelling Wired Computer Headsets for Teams Zoom Video Call Business Office Home Working Crystal Clear
features: 【Dual Mic Noise Cancellation】 Callez USB computer headset comes with advanced directional ENC dual microphones to eliminate over 95% of background noise (keyboards, chatter, home distractions). Ensure your voice is heard clearly on every call, meeting or stream, perfect for busy offices and home working environments.

【Lightweight and Comfortable】This mono headset for laptop is only 58g, feature premium protein foam ear cushions and a soft adjustable headband for unparalleled comfort. 350° rotatable and flexible mic boom can be placed left or right side. Designed for extended wear during long conference calls, online meeting, course or focused work without fatigue or pressure points.

【Universal USB Compatibility】PC headset with microphone works with Windows 2000/7/8/10/XP/Vista, Mac OS X and most leading UC Platforms, Softphone. The USB-A Plug of call center headset can be directly connected to Laptop, Computer, PC, Chromebook, iMac, phone and more devices with USB A port. Plug-and-Play, no drivers needed.

【Simple In-line Control】Convenient in-line controls, including a mute button with LED indicator and volume adjustment, allow for quick adjustments during meetings. Easily answer/end/cancel Microsoft Teams calls with a simple touch of call button.

【Durable & 2-Year Warranty】Wired USB headphone made of durable, high-quality materials for long-term reliability. Our packaging is made from recycled materials whenever possible. We offer 45 days money-back & 24 months warranty. Please feel free to contact us for any issue at any time.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 HD Sound Quality 2 Noise cancellation 3 Smart Chip Previous page Next page 1 Widely Compatible 2 In-line Control 3 Plug and Play Previous page Rotatable Microphone Arm 330°rotatable Microphone Arm can be on either left or right side. Soft Ear Cushion Soft and breathable protein ear pads enhance all-day wearing comfort. Adjustable Headband Flexible headband can be bent or stretched for all head sizes. Flexible Microphone The microphone can be adjusted to the position you want to better pick up your voice. Next page 1 Soft Ear Cushion 2 Adjustable Headband 3 Flexible Microphone 4 Rotatable Microphone Arm Previous page Next page 1 Office 2 Online Courses 3 Home Working What do I need to do if the other person can't hear me? Please try setting your USB Headphone as the default device: Control Panel -> Sound -> Recording ->Microphone (select this USB device as default audio device) ->Playback -> Speakers (select this USB device as default audio device) Can it answer a Teams call? Yes, this computer headset has convenient inline control, you can press the call button once to answer/end/cancel calls. Is this headset suitable for online classes on my laptop? Yes, this laptop headset with microphone works with Windows 8/10/11/Vista, Mac OS X, Plug and play, no drivers needed. Can I hear my own voice through the speakers? Yes, you can hear your own voice by settings: Control Panel > Sound > Recording > Microphone > Properties > Listen > Listen to this device > Playback through this device > Speaker. How long is the cable? The USB headset cable is about 2 meters / 6.56 feet.
